parentNotes.description:
Breadcrumb of the note
The first element is the channel

reviewState.description:
Review state of the note
Can be Verified, Outdated, VerificationRequested or VerificationExpired

highlight.description:
Part of the note that matched the query.
If an empty string is returned, it means only the title matched.

type.description:
Type of the note
It can be a collection, a discussion or a default rich_text.

archivedAt.description: Date of the archiving of the note (null if not archived)

iconColor.description: Optional icon color for the note.

iconShape.description: Optional icon identifier for the note.

lastEditedAt.description: Date of the last edition of the note

updatedAt.description: Date of the last update of the note
